notes:
Critical regression restore — Logs / Sleep / Wake buttons are back, plus the full hybrid SSM + DSV4 long-context fix bundle.

What broke (1.3.66 → 1.3.92):
- The Swift rewrite preview commit (d406008b, Apr 15) deleted panel/ wholesale. When the Python panel was needed again it was restored as a stripped-down zombie copy, not from the canonical main branch. ~30 panel files lost half their lines. Logs button (ScrollText), Sleep button (Moon, soft + deep), Wake button (Sun), `status: standby`, and standbyDepth all silently disappeared. Every release between 1.3.66 and 1.3.92 shipped without them.

Fixed in 1.3.93:
- Full panel restored from main: SessionCard, sessions.ts (SessionManager), ipc/sessions.ts, preload, env.d.ts, SessionDashboard, SessionView (with LogsPanel tab) — Logs / Sleep / Wake buttons visible again on running session cards.
- softSleep / deepSleep / wakeSession / touchSession all back on SessionManager. Idle-timeout monitor restored. Standby pill + Moon icon render correctly.

Bundled engine bumps + GH issues closed:
- vmlx 1.3.92 wheel published to PyPI (https://pypi.org/project/vmlx/1.3.92/). Bundled-python ships with matching dist-info — no auto-update prompt on launch.
- jjang-ai/vmlx#103: Scheduler deferred SSM re-derive now gates on `_has_unprocessed` + `_has_waiting` so queued requests never starve.
- jjang-ai/vmlx#105: Removed redundant `mx.array(a)` wraps in mamba_cache.py cache-clone sites.
- jjang-ai/vmlx#107: PLD auto-tune kill-switch now bails out before the warmup window; 1-token bootstrap no longer disables PLD prematurely.
- jjang-ai/vmlx#109: MLLM batch generator captures-during-prefill at boundary N-1-gpl and stores the SSM companion with `is_complete=True`; deferred re-derive skipped on the hot path.
- jjang-ai/vmlx#110: SSMCompanionDiskStore L2 write-through. Multi-turn cache survives restart.

DSV4 (DeepSeek V4 Flash JANGTQ):
- Long-context fix landed in jang_tools/dsv4/mlx_model.py (md5 3e526780fa16b7a950d766f347341b70): hc_premix metal kernel, fp32 hc_pre cast, long_ctx_kv_modified flag.
- Jinja kwargs honored correctly — DSV4 chat template only branches on `reasoning_effort=='max'`. Server now passes 'max' or omits the kwarg entirely; the previous 'high' value was a silent no-op for DSV4.

MLLM thread safety (Qwen3.6-A3B-JANGTQ4):
- mllm_scheduler now pins all model ops to a dedicated single-worker executor (`mllm-worker_0`). Stream(gpu, 1) crashes on JANGTQ-VL bundles eliminated. Live-verified Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-JANGTQ4: T2 30/31 cached (97% hit), 123 MB L2 disk, zero errors.

How to update — auto-updater on launch, or download below.
